issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle API errors, rate limits, or network failures, leaving edge cases unaddressed.
The skill lacks concrete code snippets or API call examples, making it harder for agents to implement the described workflows directly.

scenarios.name: send-password-reset-email
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B fails to provide any relevant command.

scenarios.name: create-onboarding-sequence
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required CLI command, draft status, preview URL, and segment verification steps, while Response A lacks any command or draft/preview details.

scenarios.name: add-subscriber-and-verify-segment
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets rubric, A does not.
